title: Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Interdictor''-class cruiser}} {{Otheruses|Leviathan}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Leviathan.jpg]] |name=''Leviathan'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] |line= |model= |type=[[Interdictor-class cruiser|''Interdictor''-class cruiser]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=600 meters |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=*[[Quad laser cannon/Legends|Quad laser cannons]] (20)[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *[[Gravity well projector/Legends|Gravity well projectors]] (4) *[[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolaser]] cannons (4) *[[Ion cannon/Legends|Ion cannons]] (2) *[[Tractor beam/Legends|Tractor beam]] generators (1) |complement=*48 [[Sith fighter]]s *2 [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] |bays= |escapepods= |crew=2,784 |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed=[[3956 BBY]] |retired= |battles=*[[Capture of Darth Revan]] *[[Attack on the Endar Spire]] *[[Skirmish aboard the Leviathan]] *[[Battle of Rakata Prime]] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] |navy= |fleet= |owners=[[Darth Malak]] |captains=[[Saul Karath]] |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Sith interdictor ship! They must have been waiting for us in the hyperspace route! We're caught in their tractor beam!''"
"''Do you recognize the ship?''"
"''It's the ''Leviathan''. Saul Karath's vessel. My old mentor.|Carth Onasi and Bastila Shan as the ''Ebon Hawk'' is detained|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''}} The '''''Leviathan''''' was an [[Interdictor-class cruiser|''Interdictor''-class cruiser]] that served the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. By the outbreak of the [[Jedi Civil War]], it had become the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the former Republic [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]], [[Saul Karath]], as he served the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] of [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] and, later, [[Darth Malak]]. The vessel was involved in a number of key battles in the latter conflict, including the [[Attack on the Endar Spire|Attack on the ''Endar Spire'']] and subsequent [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], as well as the [[Skirmish aboard the Leviathan|skirmish]] that saw the death of its commander. ==History== As with the other capital ships of the Sith fleet, the ''Leviathan'' was originally a [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] vessel. Apparently a distant technological ancestor of the later [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], ''Leviathan'' was one of many similarly designed ships commissioned by the Republic for the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. The ''Leviathan'' was the only ship of its class to come out of the [[CEC shipyards|Corellian shipyards]] spaceworthy.''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' The ''Leviathan'' was a 600-meter-long [[Interdictor-class cruiser|''Interdictor''-class cruiser]], capable of wrenching ships out of hyperspace with the use of its four gigantic gravity-well projectors. While primitive by later standards, it was the pinnacle of [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction technology]] in its time. It was also equipped with 20 quad laser cannons, a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projector, four [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries and two [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]]. [[File:Leviathan_Ebon_Hawk.png|thumb|left|250px|The ''Leviathan'' chases the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'' over Manaan.]] Brought into the service of the Sith by the defector Saul Karath, the ''Leviathan'' housed two squadrons of [[Sith fighter]]s. It was likely the vessel from which Darth Malak attacked his master's [[Darth Revan's flagship|ship]], and rendered him unconscious before he was captured by the Jedi. Later, during Malak's search for [[Bastila Shan]], he used the ''Leviathan''{{'s}} [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]] to destroy much of [[Taris/Legends|Taris's]] [[Upper City]]. The tractor beam was utilized in another attempt to capture Bastila Shan, and also the reformed [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], in which the beam was used to help board the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'' and capture the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], who were taken to the prison block. After an intense interrogation, Revan eventually escaped and made his way to the bridge, which was located next to the command deck. The door to the bridge had been sealed, but Revan and his companions donned space suits and used an airlock that led to an external walkway that had access to the bridge. Once they secured the bridge, Revan, Bastila Shan and [[Carth Onasi]] killed Admiral Karath and deactivated the tractor beam holding the ''Ebon Hawk'' in the hangar. As Revan and his companions attempted to escape, they encountered Malak, and a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] ensued between Master and apprentice. Malak ultimately gained the upper hand by catching Revan in Force [[Force Stasis/Legends|stasis]]. Bastila, however, prevented Malak from killing Revan and insisted on holding off Malak so that both Revan and Carth could escape. [[File:LeviathanEngines_kotor.jpg|thumb|right|180px|A view of ''Leviathan'' engines.]] The ''Leviathan'' was likely destroyed during the [[battle of Rakata Prime]], as its computers listed the [[Star Forge]] as its destination when Revan sliced the systems to enable the ''Ebon Hawk'' to escape. After the loss of the ''Leviathan'', the [[Ravager (Centurion-class)|''Ravager'']] and many other "proto-Star Destroyers" to Revan and Malak's Sith Empire, the Republic abandoned the design, possibly due to lack of resources, and instead used capital ships more aesthetically in line with the peaceful ages of the Republic, such as the [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]]. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Kotor_screen098.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A side view of ''Leviathan''.]] At Taris, Darth Malak's conversation with Saul implies that there is an entire fleet orbiting the planet, but the ''Leviathan'' is the only cruiser that can be seen. This is true of the movies of the destruction of Taris, as well as the view from the bridge of the ''Leviathan''. However, while manning the gun turret on the ''Ebon Hawk'', a fleet of twelve ships is visible in orbit around Taris. These are clearly too large and immobile to be fighters. Judging from their shape, they appear to be Sith Interdictor Cruisers, the same class of ships as the ''Leviathan''. According to [[John Jackson Miller]] (who, however, was not involved in the development of the game), the name ''Leviathan'' was borrowed from the [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|United Kingdom]] [[Wikipedia:Royal Navy|Royal Navy]] 18th-century ''Leviathan''-class ships, whose design was based on the captured [[Wikipedia:France|French]] 74 gun warship ''Courageux''.{{Faraway|url=comics/swknights/swkotor08.html|text=''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #8''}} The latter name was used by Miller in the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''KotOR'' comic series]] for the [[Courageous (Inexpugnable-class)|''Courageous'']], Saul Karath's battleship in [[3964 BBY]] (which, however, was not of the same design as the ''Leviathan''). ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Heroes]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *{{LucasArts|url=games/swkotor_sithlords|text=''Chronicles of the Old Republic''|int=Chronicles of the Old Republic}} *''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|admiralkarath|Karath, Admiral Saul}} *{{DB|starship|leviathan|Leviathan}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Leviathan (Interdictor-Klasse)#legends |es=Leviatán (crucero clase Interdictor) |fr=Leviathan |it=Leviathan (Incrociatore classe Interdictor) |nl=Leviathan |pl=Leviathan }} [[Category:Flagships]] [[Category:Interdictor-class cruisers]] [[Category:Starships of Darth Revan's Sith Empire]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Republic]]
